titleStmt.title: SII 10.553: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 553. (A.R. No. 184 of 1905.) ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE MAṆḌAPA IN FRONT OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE IN THE SAME TEMPLE. Ś. 1275.

summary.p: States that Māraya-Nāyaka made a gift of the village of Namilikallu in Dannālakōṭa (Dharaṇikōṭa)-sthalamu to Tripurāntaka-Mahādēva for the merit of Kāmi-Nāyaka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastasurāsuranikaramauḷimaṇigaṇaraṁjjitapādapīṭhaśrītripurāṁttakadēvadivyaśrīpāda padmārādhaka parabalasādhaka karavālacōḍanarādhipavara
prasādhaka sakaḷasāmrājyalakṣmīvilāsalāṁchana mahāḍaṁbarātapatradhavaḷacāmaraĀla vaṭṭaĀsanamauktikamaṁḍapa mahimānvita nvayajaladhisudhākara
manumakulamāṁdhāta vasaṁttacōḍakuvalayādhinātha kaṭakavajraprākāra . Ālakuṁṭṭalapu ravarādhīśvara rājēṁdracōḍa ṣēkakāraṇa pracā¨ryyasuguṇa
maṇigaṇālaṁkāra . satyahariścaṁdra . manumamallidēvaśiracchēdaka . noḍavanisāmaṁta vijaya bhujabalasaṁpādita dhvajamaṁḍalikamakaradhvajakadanapracaṁḍa benkōlu
bhaṁḍḍanapā¨rtthatōṁḍanagajakēsari samadhikata ṁbhaśaṁkhakāhaḷā paṁcamahāśabda paṁcalakṣa Eṟitala
vibhāḷa sāhasōttuṁga
sōmahōmasamayasamāhata ṇa ¨ryyamaṁggaḷakālasaṁ tavijayalakṣmī nijanivāsabhujāśikharamaṁḍḍalivibhavākhaṁḍalādisamasta praśastisahitu laina śrīmatuma
mārayanāyaṁkulu svasti śrīśakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1275 Agu nēṁṭi vijayasaṁva tsarakā¨rttika śū5 sō nāṁṭi kṛttikā yōgapuṇyakālamunappuḍu
svasti śrī matu kāmināyaṁkulakuṁ buṇyamugānu svasti śrī śrīpa¨rvvata śirōmaṇiśrī kumāragiri śrītripurāṁttaka śrīmahādēvaraAṁgaraṁgabhōgamulaku daṁnā [ la
kō ] ṭastaḷamulōna namilikallu Aniyeḍi grāmamu catussīmasakaḷāyamulunnu Aṣṭabhō gaisva¨ryyaśvāmyamulunnu Ācaṁdrā¨rkasthāyigā nistimi maṁgaḷamahāśrī
svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭi va¨rṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 10.553 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
